title: hieracium pallidum subsp. brunelliforme
intro: Hieracium pallidum subsp. brunelliforme, also known as pale hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, characterized by its pale yellow flowers and edible properties. The medicinal properties of pale hawkweed include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Pale hawkweed can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
